home.tagline: Precise timing for the shooting range
home.feature2: EPP mode with automatic total time
home.feature5: Works offline — even at the range

timer.noDisciplineHint: Please select a discipline under "Disciplines" first.

eppStations.st1: 10 shots (2×5 with magazine change). FIXED TIME — runs automatically. Start signal 2 tones, warning signal at 2 sec. remaining.
eppStations.st2: 10 shots. RO STOPS time after last shot. In case of malfunction: pause timer.
eppStations.st3: 10 shots (5 left, 5 right at post). RO STOPS time after last shot. In case of malfunction: pause timer.
eppStations.st4: 10 shots. RO STOPS time after last shot. In case of malfunction: pause timer.
eppStations.st5a: 10 shots. RO STOPS time after last shot. In case of malfunction: pause timer.
eppStations.st5b: 10 shots. FIXED TIME — runs automatically. Start signal 2 tones, warning signal at 2 sec. remaining.
eppStations.st6: 10 shots. RO STOPS time after last shot. In case of malfunction: pause timer. TOTAL TIME runs until the end.

disciplines.title: Disciplines
disciplines.defaultHint: Default discipline — changes will be saved as your own version.

editor.noPhases: No phases yet — add the first one.

onboarding.step1Text: Under "Disciplines", choose an existing discipline or create your own.
onboarding.step2Text: Press "Start" on the timer screen. The timer will guide you through all phases automatically.
onboarding.step3Text: Acoustic signals indicate the start and end of each phase. Use an external speaker for best sound quality.

settings.title: Settings
settings.resetDefaultsHint: Your own disciplines will be kept
settings.resetOnboardingHint: Navigate to the branded eXen start page
settings.resetConfirmText: The built-in disciplines will be restored to their original state. Your own disciplines will be kept.
settings.toastOnboarding: Tutorial will be shown on next start

help.title: Help
help.quickstart1: Select or create a discipline under "Disciplines"
help.quickstart3: Press "Start" — audio signal sounds at phase start and end
help.quickstart4: For EPP: fixed stations run automatically, open stations must be ended manually
help.eppFixedDesc: (1, 5b): Timer runs automatically, warning signal sounds shortly before time runs out.
help.eppOpenDesc: (2, 3, 4, 5a, 6): Time counts up, Range Officer stops manually via "End station".
help.eppPauseDesc: : Stops both the station AND the total timer simultaneously for open stations.
help.eppTotalDesc: counts down from 5:30 (330 sec.) across all stations.
help.audioTip: For use at the shooting range, I recommend an external speaker or headphones. The internal smartphone speaker may be too quiet in loud environments.
help.faq1a: The browser activates audio only after user interaction. First tap "Start" or another button. For reliable sound, I recommend an external speaker.
help.faq2q: How do I create my own discipline?
help.faq2a: Under "Disciplines", tap "+ New". Enter a name and add as many phases as you like. Each phase has preparation time, duration, repetitions and audio signals.
help.faq3q: How do I export / import disciplines?
help.faq3a: Under "Disciplines" at the bottom, tap "Export" — the JSON text is copied to the clipboard. To import, tap "Import" and paste the text.
help.faq4a: Yes. The app is installed as a PWA and works fully offline — even without internet access at the shooting range.
help.faq5a: For normal disciplines: press "Pause". For EPP: only at open stations (RO-stopped) via "Malfunction / Pause" — this also stops the total time.
